title: Dell FY2026 AI Server Shipments Target $25B
summary: Dell reports record revenue for FY2026, with Infrastructure Solutions Group (ISG) revenue jumping 73%. AI-optimized server shipments hit $9.5B in Q4, with a backlog now reaching $43B.

title: HPE Showcases AI-Native Networking & Compute at MWC 2026
summary: HPE unveiled new AI infrastructure solutions designed for service providers to reduce costs and automate operations. The company currently holds a $5B server order backlog.

title: Lenovo Signals Price Hikes Across Server Lineup
summary: Lenovo ISG warned partners of impending price increases for servers and client devices starting March 2026, citing significant spikes in DRAM costs and a global memory chip shortage.

title: Wiwynn Partners with Ayar Labs for Co-Packaged Optics
summary: Wiwynn is integrating co-packaged optics into rack-scale AI systems to handle hyperscale workloads. The company also noted memory price increases are starting to impact server costs.

title: Gigabyte Launches GB300 NVL72 Liquid-Cooled AI Rack
summary: Showcased at MWC 2026, the GB300 NVL72 integrates 72 NVIDIA Blackwell Ultra GPUs and 36 Grace CPUs, optimized for large-scale telecom AI training and inference.

title: Supermicro Delivers Scalable AI Infrastructure for AI-RAN
summary: Supermicro expanded its support for AI-RAN and sovereign AI solutions using the latest CPUs/GPUs to power telecom networks and secure AI factories.

title: QCT Debuts QuantaEdge EGN77C AI-RAN Server
summary: Quanta Cloud Technology highlighted its 'application-ready' 2U AI-RAN server at MWC 2026, supporting Nokia anyRAN and NVIDIA ARC-Pro frameworks.
